title: The pi-context command ships as its own publish unit (@davidorex/pi-context-cli carries the bin)
context: The global pi-context command (FGAP-047) and --pi-bound (FEAT-005) need a publish unit that hosts the CLI bin. Two shapes compete: the CLI as its own published package depending on @davidorex/pi-context (and, for --pi-bound, the meta-package), versus folding the bin into the meta-package @davidorex/pi-project-workflows. The meta-package ships only *.ts/*.md/skills/ with no dist/ or built CLI entry.
decision: Keep the bin in @davidorex/pi-context-cli as its own publish unit; npm i -g @davidorex/pi-context-cli pulls the dependency tree, mirroring how pi ships its CLI. Do not relocate the CLI build into the meta-package.
consequences: pi-context-cli remains the single bin host; the meta-package stays a non-built TS/skills bundle.
Global install is the lowest-delta path — no CLI-build relocation into the meta-package.
--pi-bound's access to the meta-package is via a declared dependency (FGAP-048), not co-location.

references.label: meta-package ships only ts/md/skills, no dist/bin
